title: DesaturatedWine GUI
description: Have a little taste of this light themed GUI
body:
## YOUR _STYLIZED LIGHT THEMED_ GUI PACK, NOW ON MODRINTH!
### PROBABLY WORKS ON EVERY VERSION

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/BMXHm2CWc18" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


I've often seen ResourcePacks that try to focus on a single color, or that are just GUIs painted in some color in a disappointing way. With this GUI pack I tried to bring aesthetics that are pleasing to the eye even though this pack is (almost) entirely based on a single color palette.

![A palette of six colors, being 4 shades of purple and 2 shades of white](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab1bc68c315683c5e90b92ce4daf7cc8fc33fb55.png)

I spent almost two months designing each UI, pixel by pixel, so I hope it really is as beautiful for you as it was for me.
Also, you can use it on your videos and gameplays, but credit me if you can :P
